name: Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (161°C).
2. Grease the bottoms only of 2 loaf pans.
3. Mix sugar and shortening in a large bowl.
4. Add eggs, pumpkin, and water; mix well.
5. Blend in flour, baking soda, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, cloves. Stir in raisins and nuts.
6. Pour batter into pans.
7. Bake 1 hour and 10 minutes (until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean).
8. Cool for 5 minutes; remove from pans.
9. Allow to cool completely before slicing.
